/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tst_installworker.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tst_installworker.dir/tst_installworker_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_installworker.dir/tests/tst_installworker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_installworker.dir/src/installworker.cpp.o -o tst_installworker  /usr/lib64/libQt6Test.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3
